goals: Capture and qualify inbound leads faster
Reduce no-show rate for service appointments
productSummary: Multi-brand dealer group with 8 showrooms and 5 service centers across the Netherlands and Belgium. Handles new and used vehicle sales, financing, and after-sales service.

knownTeams.name: Sales
knownTeams.description: Inbound lead handling, test drive bookings, and deal follow-up

knownTeams.name: Service Desk
knownTeams.description: Appointment scheduling, service status updates, and warranty claims

currentSetup.primaryUseCase: Lead qualification and service appointment management

analyticsDataInventory.coverageSummary: DriveLane has basic messaging and CRM data connected. No voice, AI, automation, survey, or knowledge-base integrations are set up yet.

businessDefinitions.openTicket: Inquiries not yet resolved, including pending test drives and service follow-ups.
businessDefinitions.firstResponse: Time from inquiry creation to first advisor reply.
businessDefinitions.newContact: Lead or customer with no prior contact in the trailing 180 days.

suggestedPreviewContext: Focus on lead response time, pipeline conversion by dealership, and service appointment scheduling efficiency.
